component.name: Inbox icon
component.description: 24×24 inbox/tray stroke icon on a 40×40 frame with optional notification badge (Brand/Primary, Typography/Body-Small label on cream per Figma). Glyph paths match Figma-exported `inbox.svg` (24×24, stroke 2). Used in Top Header **Title + Inbox** (`231:817`). Variants in file: with badge vs no notifications.

variants.withBadge: Badge top-right: min 16px height, pill; count uses Typography/Body-Small; text Foundation/Background/Default.
